name: The Soldiers
overview: The World's first military national team selection match! Leaders from Korea's 707 Special Task Force, British SAS, Sweden's SOG, and US green beret will pick members from Korea's elite special forces to make a team to represent South Korea in a national competition.

trailers.title: 전 세계와 대결할 특수 요원을 선발하라! | 더솔져스(THE SOLDIERS)ㅣTeaser.1
